name: Puffed Apple Pancake
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs cooking apples (such as Golden Delicious), peeled, cored, and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Melt butter in a large, ovenproof skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the apples and 2 tbsp sugar; cook, stirring occasionally, for 15-20 minutes, or until the apples are tender and liquid has evaporated.
4. Stir in vanilla extract and cinnamon.
5. Remove from heat.
6. In a separate bowl, beat together milk, eggs, egg whites, remaining 1 tbsp sugar, and salt until well combined.
7. Gradually whisk in flour until the batter is smooth and well blended.
8. Pour the batter over the hot apples in the skillet.
9. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 20 minutes.
10. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until puffed and browned.
11. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar.
12. Cut into wedges and serve.
